prompt: Bold fun emblem badge logo for a clay-pigeon ball-trap shooting club named 'LA DETENTE'. On the left a realistic modern black AR-15 rifle with a magazine; on the right a realistic over-and-under wooden break-action clay-shooting shotgun; the two guns crossed in a clean X. A big glossy bright red 3D heart in the exact center over the crossing point. An orange clay pigeon disc shattering into several fragments at the top. The club name in large FUN bold playful comic display lettering: LA DETENTE, cream and gold with a dark outline, correctly spelled. Round dark charcoal badge with a polished gold ring. Centered, symmetrical, crisp clean edges, ready for t-shirt print and embroidery, photorealistic metal and walnut wood textures, dramatic studio lighting, ultra detailed, no watermark, no extra text besides LA DETENTE.
